expectations.text: Identifies the exponentiation syntax error (missing parentheses around base)
expectations.evidence: Clearly identified '[height_cm]^2' as invalid, explained both base and exponent need their own parentheses

expectations.text: Does not flag [weight_kg] or [height_cm] as reference errors (no context was provided to check against)
expectations.evidence: No reference errors fabricated. Did not ask for a field list or flag variables as potentially missing.
